Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE expediente_digital OWNER postgres;" && sudo -u postgres psql -c "\\l" | grep expediente)

Bash(for f in \\

  "/www/wwwroot/crm.globalfeetpanama.com/resources/views/modules/settings/permissions/create.blade.php" \\

  "/www/wwwroot/crm.globalfeetpanama.com/resources/views/modules/settings/permissions/templates/create.blade.php" \\
  "/www/wwwroot/crm.globalfeetpanama.com/resources/views/modules/settings/permissions/templates/index.blade.php" \\
  "/www/wwwroot/crm.globalfeetpanama.com/resources/views/modules/settings/permissions/index.blade.php" \\

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "SELECT id, tipo_accion, detalles FROM log_clientes ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "
UPDATE log_clientes
SET detalles = detalles::text::jsonb
WHERE jsonb_typeof\(detalles\) = 'string';
")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "
UPDATE log_clientes
SET detalles = \(detalles::text\)::jsonb
WHERE jsonb_typeof\(detalles::jsonb\) = 'string';
")

Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "SELECT detalles->>'usuario' as usuario, detalles->>'ip' as ip, detalles->>'fecha' as fecha, detalles->'cambios' as cambios FROM log_clientes LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "SELECT detalles::jsonb->>'usuario' as usuario, detalles::jsonb->>'ip' as ip, detalles::jsonb->>'fecha' as fecha FROM log_clientes LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "SELECT id, detalles FROM log_clientes LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d expediente_digital -c "SELECT id, left\(detalles, 100\) FROM log_clientes;")
